title: Token Supply & Metadata
description: Fetch token contract metadata including name, symbol, decimals, logo, and current USD price — all embedded in the wallet balance response for any address that holds the token.
useCase: Build a token directory that shows name, symbol, decimals, logo, and live USD price for any ERC-20 token in your app — no separate metadata endpoint needed.

keyParams.walletAddress: Any wallet address holding the token
